summary: Iteration 154: Verified print/view modal changes for custom_fields display in Auto Weight Entries and VehicleWeight components. All features working correctly - view modal shows 'WEIGHT SLIP' header with custom_fields (above in red, below in gray), print button uses HTML print with party copy + customer copy format, download button available for PDF slip.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: AutoWeightEntries.jsx lines 109-224 - handlePrint function generates full HTML print with party copy + customer copy format, includes custom_fields from branding API
PASS: AutoWeightEntries.jsx lines 226-238 - openPhotos fetches branding with custom_fields and passes to photoDialog
PASS: AutoWeightEntries.jsx lines 393-399 - View modal renders custom_fields above (red) and below (gray) company name
PASS: AutoWeightEntries.jsx line 362 - Print button calls handlePrint(e) with correct entry data
PASS: AutoWeightEntries.jsx line 363 - Download button calls handlePdf(e) for PDF slip
PASS: VehicleWeight.jsx lines 1319-1324 - View modal renders custom_fields with same styling as AutoWeightEntries
PASS: Settings.jsx lines 103-210 - Branding tab allows adding up to 6 custom fields with label, value, position, placement options
PASS: GET /api/branding returns custom_fields array with correct structure

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login, navigation, view modals, print/download buttons all verified

seed_data_creation: Added custom field 'GST No.: 12ABCDE3456F' with placement 'above' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom fields feature fully working. View modal in both VehicleWeight and AutoWeightEntries shows custom_fields from branding settings. Print button in AutoWeightEntries generates HTML print with party copy + customer copy format including custom_fields. Download button generates PDF slip. Settings > Branding tab allows adding up to 6 custom fields with label, value, position (left/center/right), and placement (above/below company name). Current test data: GST No.: 12ABCDE3456F with placement 'above'.

features_tested.auto_weight_entries_page_loads: PASS - Page loads with 4 entries showing

handlePrint_function.description: Generates HTML print with A5 page size, party copy + customer copy format, includes custom_fields from branding API with above/below placement styling
